steps.title: executeSearch
steps.output:
Provider: tavily, Query: Budapest
- Budapest - Wikipedia (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Budapest): # Budapest. | Skyline with the Chain Bridge (background), the Elisabeth Bridge "Elisabeth Bridge (Budapest)"), Banks of Danube and Downtown of Pest from GellÃ©rt Hill  Hungarian Parliament  SzÃ©chenyi Thermal Bath  Opera House on AndrÃ¡ssy Avenue  Fisherman's Bastion with Matthias Church  Great Market Hall on VÃ¡ci Street  Infopark science and business district  Margaret Island and Margaret Bridge | |. | Nicknames: Queen of Danube, Capital of Spas, Heart of Europe, Paris of the East | |. | Budapest is located in Hungary Budapest  Budapest   Show map of Hungary  Budapest is located in Europe Budapest  Budapest   Show map of Europe | |. **Budapest** is the capital and most populous city of Hungary. It is Hungary's primate city with 1.7 million inhabitants and its greater metro area has a population of about 3.3 million, representing one-third of the country's population and producing more than 40% of the country's economic output.
- Budapest: City of Paradox by Rick Steves (https://www.ricksteves.com/watch-read-listen/read/articles/budapest-city-of-paradox): # Budapest: City of Paradox. Most Americans choose Prague as their first foray into formerly communist Europe, but the true powerhouse of the region is Budapest, capital of Hungary. Budapest can be challenging and complicated â but it's a cosmopolitan place of unexpected elegance, fascinating and rewarding. Sprawling across the banks of the Danube River, the city is really two towns in one. The west side is stately Buda, with its Castle Hill and remnants of Hungary's glory days. Budapest boomed in the late 19th century, after the Habsburg rulers made it co-capital â with Vienna â of their vast Austro-Hungarian empire. Not wanting to play second fiddle to Vienna, Budapest used the millennial celebration as an excuse to remake the capital with grand squares, heroic monuments, and even a subway (the Continent's oldest). You can also relax with a splish-splash in one of the city's famous thermal baths â my personal favorite among all of Budapest's inviting experiences.
- Discover Budapest (https://visithungary.com/discoverbudapest): * World Heritage sites in Budapest. # Discover Budapest. Budapest awaits you with unforgettable experiences and timeless elegance! Choose from the highlights below, explore the beauties and enjoy what the capital has to offer! A walk around Budapestâs historic architecture. The highs and lows, the biggest and smallest of Budapest. Budapest and Greater Budapest - Bucket list. CASTLES IN AND AROUND BUDAPEST. Art experiences in Budapest â from classic museums to contemporary galleries. The new wonders of the City Park in Budapest: the House of Music Hungary and the Museum of Ethnography. Letâs go to the Jewish Quarter of Budapest! A signature feature of the Hungarian capital is the river Danube that flows through it, separating Buda and Pest. A stroll along the Danube is a treat in itself, as both sides of the river house sites and locations that you should definitely commemorate with a selfie. Information about the ways of traveling to Hungary#### How to get around in Hungary.
- Budapest | History, Language, Population, Climate, & Facts (https://www.britannica.com/place/Budapest): Budapest, city, capital of Hungary, and seat of Pest megye (county). The city is the political, administrative, industrial, and commercial centre of Hungary.
- Budapest.com - Your Ultimate Guide to Budapest (https://www.budapest.com): ### Night of Museums 2026: One Ticket, Hundreds of Experiences. Night of Museum 2026 turns Budapest into one huge cultural festival, with museums, galleries and historic sites open late, special programmes, concerts and guided toursâall accessible with a single wristband for one night only. ### Before the Chain Bridge: The Ingenious Way Budapest Used to Cross the Danube. Discover the wild, floating history of the Danube before the Chain Bridge! free outdoor cinema screenings in the City Park in Budapest for summer 2026. ### Free Outdoor Cinema Screenings Await You in Budapest's City Park This Summer. Visitors will be treated to three free outdoor cinema screenings a week for two months in the City Park in Budapest. one beer festival in budapest 2026. Discover the experiences of the Mercedes-Benz Studio Budapest program series and learn more about the iconic models. night of museums 2026 in hungary. Anna Karenina musical premiere at the Margaret Island Theatre Budapest 2026. ### Morrissey to Perform in Budapest in 2026.
